tasks: Maintining and extending features in web apps (PHP, Code igniter).
Designed and developed a Quality Control (QC) management system (ASP.NET, C#, WinForms) covering full lifecycle from requisites and database design to deployment.
Implemented key features including QC record management, label generation/printing, FileShare-based file handling, and automated data extraction.
Developed supporting tools including a print server and a desktop app integrating DevExpress for label template design.
Maintained and extended HR & project management system (Laravel/PHP), adding features and resolving bugs.
Contributed to event management platform by implementing employee clock-in/clock-out functionality.
Refactored and enhanced a WordPress plugin to fetch and display API data, improving admin UX and enabling custom templating for clients websites with dynamic data.
Built and maintained custom Laravel applications for organism collection management.
Developed PowerShell scripts to automate API client generation and streamline deployment workflows.
Performed feature enhancements, bug fixes, and maintenance across multiple client web platforms (Laravel/PHP).
Contributed to multiple internal web applications including HR & project management, CRM, and event management systems using Laravel, CodeIgniter, and ASP.NET.
Enhanced HR system (Laravel/PHP) by implementing new features such as automated task reminder emails and task management (CRUD), improving performance and fixing bugs.
Migrated legacy client platforms to updated system versions ensuring database compatibility.
Adjusted CRM features (CodeIgniter/PHP), including role-based access control and UI improvements.
Extended event management platform (ASP.NET/C#/TypeScript) by implementing QR code-based content filtering.
